title: Surprised by how much the AI Claw handles for SUI
author: thienpro2
selftext:
Honestly, I did not expect this AI bot to do so much of the heavy lifting. Trading feels way more effortless now that I am using the AI Claw feature.

It just caught a solid SUI/USDT setup during the geopolitical dip. It did not just look at the chart; it combined the Chainalysis news with a strong ADX of 44.81 and perfect moving average alignment.

The coolest part? It flagged a Strong Buy because the Fear and Greed Index hit 11. Even with an overbought RSI, the artificial intelligence prioritized the contrarian sentiment. This tool on BingX is basically like having a full team of analysts working for me.

Are you guys using any AI bots or automated tools to help with your daily trading, or are you still doing everything manually?

comments.author: Creative-Elephant-37
comments.body:
That’s actually pretty cool 👀 Sounds like a solid mix of data and sentiment.

AI tools like that can be really useful as long as you keep an eye on risk. Curious how consistent the signals are over time.

comments.author: Sufficient_Fuel5269
comments.body: It must be a perfect complement to your own analysis, having that data in real time is great👌✍️📊

comments.author: Shalaw_m
comments.body:
I’m eyeing this and can’t do like that!

I’ve been running OpenClaw for a month now. Wanted to do something with it for trading but I don’t have much knowledge in trading. 

My question is, how do I go about it? How do learn to do that?

comments.author: Mother-Pace2764
comments.body: This guy is selling you something people
